heading: Congressional Record: maps; diagrams; illustrations
label: 904 Congressional Record: maps; diagrams; illustrations
text: Maps, diagrams, or illustrations may not be inserted in the Record without the approval of the Joint Committee on Printing.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 182b (, as added , title II, § 2, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 14June 20, 1936, ch. 63049 Stat. 1546
